description: Sweep de otimizacao — gemma4:e4b (9.6GB) via Ollama no Snapdragon 8 Gen 5. Orquestrador/cerebro para chain-of-thought.

baseline.note: Gemma usa Ollama, nao recompilado. Parametros via ollama run.

sweeps.name: batch_size
sweeps.note: Ollama ignora batch customizado. Fixo em 256.

sweeps.name: flash_attn
sweeps.note: Nao suportado no Ollama. Fixo em off.

sweeps.name: ngl
sweeps.note: Vulkan via Ollama. 10 = sweet spot. 9.6GB pode saturar GPU.

sweeps.name: mlock
sweeps.note: 9.6GB — mlock=on travaria RAM demais. Nao recomendado.

test_prompts.text: Write a Python function that sums even numbers in a list. Code only.
Explain how a CPU executes a program step by step.
